title: Simulations Plus teams up with Nvidia to accelerate AI-driven drug modelling
description: Simulations Plus has announced a collaboration with Nvidia aimed at speeding up drug development by combining advanced simulation software with GPU-powered computing and artificial intelligence tools.The California-based modelling software company said the partnership will focus on improving the speed and scale of scientific workflows used by pharmaceutical researchers, particularly in areas such as quantitative systems pharmacology (QSP) and pharmacokinetics/pharmacodynamics (PK/PD) modelling.
content:

title: AI boom keeping markets elevated despite geopolitical noise: Mark Matthews
description: Financial markets are increasingly prioritizing artificial intelligence-driven growth and corporate earnings over geopolitical tensions, according to Mark Matthews. He highlights extraordinary earnings, particularly in tech, fueling market highs despite Middle East uncertainty. Matthews also sees India as attractive due to improving valuations and continued FII buying.

title: Musk vs Altman: Before suing OpenAI, Musk tried to bring its leaders under Tesla
description: Fresh courtroom testimony has revealed how Elon Musk once explored bringing OpenAI’s founding team, including Sam Altman, into Tesla as internal tensions mounted over the future of artificial intelligence. One proposal involved bringing Altman, OpenAI president Greg Brockman and chief scientist Ilya Sutskever into Tesla’s fold. Another idea considered hiring Demis Hassabis to lead Tesla’s AI ambitions.
content:
Long before Sam Altman became the public face of the AI boom and ChatGPT transformed the tech industry, Elon Musk was quietly attempting to pull OpenAI’s leadership into Tesla.
New details emerging from the ongoing legal battle between Musk and OpenA... [3605 chars]

title: Native Government In India: ServiceNow Vice Chairman Nick Tzitzon – Outlook Business

title: AI Alert: Cybersecurity Concerns Raised by New Model
description: India's Financial Services Secretary has indicated that Anthropic's new AI model has amplified global cybersecurity concerns. This development has caught the attention of banking regulators worldwide, urging them to address potential risks associated with this advancement in artificial intelligence.
content: The Secretary of India's Department of Financial Services has raised alarms over a new AI model developed by Anthropic. This latest technology is reportedly escalating cybersecurity concerns on a global scale, demanding immediate attention from regul... [556 chars]
